headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -46.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 52% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 164 quotes and exceptionally high intensity - 122 strong-intensity comments are driving people to vent hard today.

• At 45.6, frustration levels remain well above the typical range and near the upper quarter of the 147-day period.

• Optimism recovered notably from yesterday's deep low but stays in negative territory with mixed intensity levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
